overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a wizard character in robes exploring castle grounds at night. The character walks through illuminated gardens, passes under stone archways, and ascends onto ancient battlements with panoramic mountain views.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed garden corridor with flower beds and stone walls

events.description: emerging from shaded corridor into area illuminated by street lamps

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along cobblestone path through enclosed garden corridor lined with lavender and white flowers

notable_agents.action: character in red robes walking ahead on the path, moving toward the garden exit

entered.detail: tall stone wall covered in ivy running along the left side of the path
tall stone wall with wooden gates on the right side
dense patches of purple lavender flowers along the path edge
clusters of white flowers lining the left side of the walkway
simple wooden bench positioned under a tree
ornate black iron lamp post with warm glowing light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed garden corridor with high stone walls and dense flower beds. The path is cobblestone and lined with wooden benches and glowing iron lamps. Another character in red robes is visible ahead, walking in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open castle garden with topiary and approaching main building

events.description: passing under large archway formed by manicured hedges and topiary
large domed castle building becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through open garden area toward the castle building, passing the NPC in red robes

entered.detail: large natural archway formed by manicured hedges and trees
massive stone castle with prominent domed tower and multiple spires
large circular fountain basin with water in the castle courtyard
ornate stone archway entrance with columns leading to outer grounds

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide garden area under a night sky. The character passes under a topiary archway and approaches a massive domed castle building. A circular fountain appears on the right, and an ornate stone archway gateway is visible ahead leading to outer grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with fountain and stone gateway

events.description: passing through stone archway gateway into outer grassy grounds

agents.ego_description: walking past the circular fountain and approaching the stone archway entrance to exit the castle courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the castle courtyard, passing closely by the circular fountain on the right. The domed castle building falls behind as the character approaches and passes through the stone archway gateway, transitioning from the paved courtyard to the outer grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy outer grounds with beehives and approaching ruins

events.description: entering ancient stone ruins and ascending to the battlements

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass past wooden beehives toward the ancient stone ruins on the horizon

entered.detail: cluster of traditional wooden beehives stacked in the grassy field
ancient crumbling stone walls and fortifications on the hillside
snow-capped mountains visible on the horizon under the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide grassy field with wooden beehives scattered on the left. Ancient stone ruins stand in the distance against a backdrop of mountains. The ground transitions from cobblestone to grass as the character approaches the ruins entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle battlements with crenellated walls and mountain views

events.description: turning right to follow the battlement wall walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing stone steps onto the castle battlements and walking along the crenellated wall with views of distant mountains

entered.detail: high stone defensive walls with weathered surfaces
stone wall with regular gaps and merlons along the top
panoramic view of mountain range through the crenellations

segments.scene_description: The character ascends onto the castle battlements, walking along narrow stone pathways between high crenellated walls. The grassy field and beehives are left behind as the character navigates the ancient fortifications, with stunning views of the distant mountain range visible through gaps in the parapets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate confines of a lit garden into the expansive heights of ancient castle battlements. It begins in a narrow cobblestone corridor enclosed by high stone walls and glowing lamps, following a figure in red robes through dense flower beds. As the path opens into a wide garden, the camera passes under a topiary archway toward a massive domed building and a circular fountain before gliding through an ornate stone gateway. The scene then shifts from the paved courtyard to a wide grassy field dotted with wooden beehives, moving toward distant stone ruins set against a mountain backdrop. Finally, the camera ascends the fortifications, leaving the fields behind to navigate narrow stone pathways between high crenellated walls with panoramic views of the mountain range.
